name: 5q14_3_intragenic_SDs
description: 5q14.3 region containing MEF2C and short flanking SDs. Recurrent 5q14.3 microdeletions cause a severe intellectual disability and epilepsy phenotype with MEF2C as the dosage-critical gene. The flanking SDs are short (~10-30 kb) and at ~95% identity; not all 5q14.3 deletions are SD-mediated (many non-recurrent breakpoints).

architecture.internal_structure: Short flanking SDs of ~10-30 kb at ~95% identity; unique core contains MEF2C, RASA1, CCNH; deletion-prone but not strictly recurrent; LINE-1-rich flanks.
